common.appDescription: The visual editor you need to turn data into action.

hero.description: Build beautiful forms in minutes. Simple, fast, and at a fraction of the cost.

problem.title: Tired of tools that are
problem.subtitle: Enterprise form builders force you to pay outrageous bills for forms that look like they're from 2010.

pricing.title: Unpredictable pricing
pricing.description: The more responses you get, the more you pay. Your costs skyrocket right when you're most successful.

preview.title: Separate preview
preview.description: You edit in one place, preview in another. And when you publish... it never looks the same.

complexity.title: Unnecessary complexity
complexity.description: 100 features you'll never use. Bloated interfaces that slow down your work.

solution.title: With Pyform, everything is different
solution.description: Real-time editing. Flat pricing. Create immersive experiences in minutes, without sacrificing your brand's elegance.

features.title: Everything you need to create amazing forms
features.subtitle: Pyform combines the simplicity of Google Forms with the elegance of Typeform, at a fraction of the cost. No unnecessary features, no surprise pricing.

proAnnual.name: Pro Annual
proAnnual.description: Save 40% with the annual plan — best value

faq.title: Everything you need to know
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about Pyform and how it can help you.

questionTypes.question: What types of questions can I create?
questionTypes.answer: Pyform includes 15 question types ready to use: short text, long text, email, phone, number, URL, date, dropdown, multiple choice, checkboxes, file upload, and special modules like welcome, goodbye, and quotes.
questionTypes.answer2: Each module is customizable: you can mark them as required, add descriptions, and reorder them with drag and drop.

editor.question: How does the editor work?
editor.answer: Our editor is real-time WYSIWYG: what you see while editing is exactly what your users will see. Drag modules to reorder them, edit properties in the side panel, and see changes reflected instantly with no separate preview mode.
editor.answer2: It works on both desktop and mobile, with an interface adapted to each screen.

stats.question: What analytics are included?
stats.answer: Each form includes a complete analytics dashboard with: completion rate, average response time, submission timeline, and a drop-off funnel that shows you exactly which question loses users.
stats.answer2: You can also view each individual response and export everything to CSV with one click.

customization.question: Can I customize the design of my forms?
customization.answer: Yes. From the editor settings panel you can change the primary color, typography, border radius, and shadows. All changes are applied in real time to the form.
customization.answer2: Your form will look professional and consistent with your brand without writing a single line of CSS.

subscription.question: How does the subscription work?
subscription.answer: Pyform uses a flat monthly rate. We don't charge per response, so it doesn't matter if your form receives 10 or 10,000 submissions — your price stays the same.
subscription.answer2: All features are included from day one, with no hidden plans or forced upgrades. You can cancel anytime.

fileUpload.question: Can I receive files in my forms?
fileUpload.answer: Yes. The file upload module allows your users to attach documents, images, or other files directly in the form. You can preview received files from the responses panel.

cta.title: Your next form,
cta.subtitle: Live editor, built-in analytics, and a price that doesn't change with your forms' success. No surprises.

auth.title: Create account or Log in

subscription.paymentFailedDescription: We're automatically retrying the charge. If the payment doesn't go through, your subscription will be canceled and you'll lose access. Update your payment method to avoid interruptions.
